name: slack_list_channels
description: List public channels in the Slack workspace with pagination. Each entry includes channel ID, name, topic, and member count.

limit.description: Maximum number of channels to return (default 100, max 200)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor returned by a previous call

name: slack_post_message
description: Post a message to a Slack channel on behalf of the connected bot. Supports plain text and Block Kit payloads.

channel_id.description: The ID of the channel to post to

text.description: The message text to post; falls back when blocks are unavailable

blocks.description: Optional Block Kit blocks to render a rich message

name: slack_reply_to_thread
description: Reply to an existing Slack message thread. Requires the parent message timestamp as returned by channel history.

channel_id.description: The ID of the channel containing the thread

name: slack_add_reaction
description: Add an emoji reaction to a Slack message. The emoji name must be provided without surrounding colons.

channel_id.description: The ID of the channel containing the message

timestamp.description: The timestamp of the message to react to

emoji.description: The name of the emoji reaction (without colons)

name: slack_get_channel_history
description: Return recent messages from a Slack channel in reverse chronological order. Includes user IDs and message timestamps.

channel_id.description: The ID of the channel to read

name: slack_get_thread_replies
description: Return every reply in a Slack message thread in chronological order, including the parent message itself.

channel_id.description: The ID of the channel containing the thread

name: slack_get_user_profile
description: Get detailed profile information for a Slack user including display name, title, email, and avatar URL.

user_id.description: The Slack user ID to fetch

name: send_email
description: Send an email through the connected transport. Supports plain text and HTML bodies and arbitrary recipients in to/cc/bcc.

to.description: Recipient email addresses in the To field

text.description: Plain text body of the email

html.description: Optional HTML body; if omitted, text is used

cc.description: Addresses to include in the Cc field

name: list_emails
description: List emails from a mailbox using an optional search query. Returns subject, sender, snippet, and message ID per item.

max_results.description: Maximum number of emails to return (1-200)

page_token.description: Pagination token returned by a previous call

name: get_email
description: Fetch a single email by its message ID and return the full MIME body, headers, and attachment metadata.

message_id.description: Unique identifier of the email to fetch

include_attachments.description: If true, include attachment metadata and content IDs

name: create_calendar_event
description: Create a new calendar event with a title, description, start and end times, and a list of invitee email addresses.

calendar_id.description: Identifier of the target calendar (default: primary)

name: send_sms
description: Send an SMS message via the connected provider. Supports E.164 phone numbers. Returns the provider message ID and delivery status.

to.description: Destination phone number in E.164 format (e.g. +14155550123)

body.description: Text body of the SMS (up to 1600 characters)
